validation_rules.requirement: Materials Teresa buys out of pocket for a job
validation_rules.notes: Snap the receipt, tag the customer, reconcile against the invoice that bills it back through.

validation_rules.requirement: Truck miles driven for side jobs
validation_rules.notes: Standard mileage rate. Job runs only, not the commute to Penobscot Electrical.
Holds back for quarterly federal and Maine estimated tax.
Brian runs the household budget review; flag anything that does not tie out.
Tools used for both the day job and side work stay personal unless bought for a specific customer job.

context: Simple rules Teresa follows so the 1099 side-job stream stays clean for tax time and the monthly budget talk with Brian.
